content: Official Video for “Going Shopping” by The Strokes Reality Awaits: thestrokes.lnk.to/realityawaits thestrokes.com instagram.com/thestrokes tiktok.com/@thestrokes facebook.com/thestrokes x.com/thestrokes Merch: shop.thestrokes.com "Going Shopping" Starring Walton Goggins Directed by Johann Rashid Produced by Nick Ventura LYRICS: Like a tiger they will chase you down With words instead of claws They will seduce you till you reach the point to let yourself get mauled The worse reality gets the less you wanna hear about it Solidarity can be difficult when you’ve got cool stuff to lose I wanna be a 7-foot zombie the pay is low but I gotta do something I’m at the mall, the song is bumping. There goes my future wife in a little red jumpsuit I’m going away to the country Don’t wander off too far I’m going out my mind Throwin' all my plans out the window Don’t wanna waste my life I’ll see you on the other side I’ve been thinking about what I want to say But I’m an old man now, at least that’s what they tell me anyway We’ve been expanding on our greatness Building future ruins We’re building castles from the bones of dead trees Molded from the shattered houses of the dead sea I moved away to the country I had to change my way But I kinda miss you now Stockbrokers flying out the window, I kinda miss that sound 'Don't wanna wake up Pa' - I can’t wait, I’m going shopping I’m at the mall, and the song is bumpin’ I want to be a 7-foot starfish above the law like good little puppet I’m going back to the city I’m ‘bout to lose my mind I’m gonna stay alive I’m climbing out through the window I miss the shops and malls I’m gonna meet you there Still throwing my phone out the window I’m gonna soothe my soul Can’t wait I’m going shopping If you’re better than me you don’t have to judge me (c) 2026 RCA Records, a division of Sony Music Entertainment #TheStrokes #Goingshopping #WaltonGoggins
chineseContent: The Strokes 的“Going Shopping”官方视频 Reality Awaits：theStrokes.lnk.to/realityawaits theStrokes.com instagram.com/theStrokes tiktok.com/@theStrokes facebook.com/theStrokes x.com/theStrokes 商品：shop.theStrokes.com “Going Shopping”由 Walton Goggins 主演，Johann Rashid 执导，Nick Ventura 制作 歌词：Like a老虎，他们会追赶你，用言语而不是利爪，他们会引诱你，直到你到达让自己受到伤害的地步。越糟糕的现实，你就越不想听到它。当你有很酷的东西要失去时，团结可能会很困难。我想成为一个 7 英尺高的僵尸，工资很低，但我必须做点什么，我在商场，歌曲很震撼。我未来的妻子穿着一件小红连衣裤，我要去乡下，不要走得太远，我要失去理智，把我所有的计划都扔到窗外，不想浪费我的生命，我会在另一边见到你，我一直在想我想说的话，但我现在是个老人了，至少他们是这么告诉我的，我们一直在扩展我们的伟大，建造未来的废墟，我们正在用死树的骨头建造城堡，死海的破烂房屋我搬到了乡下我不得不改变我的方式但我现在有点想念你股票经纪人飞出窗外，我有点想念那个声音“不想叫醒爸爸”-我等不及了，我要去购物我在商场，歌曲很颠簸我想成为一个超越法律的7英尺高的海星就像善良的小木偶我要回到城市我快要失去理智了我要活下去我要从窗户爬出去我想念商店和商场我会在那里遇见你仍然把我的手机扔出窗外我要安慰我的灵魂等不及我要去购物如果你比我更好你不必评判我（
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
